title: SAFARI 3000M
description: The SAFARI 3000 (Electric Motor) is a high-capacity reversible drum mixer designed for fast, consistent concrete production in large-scale construction projects. Built for performance and durability, this mixer is ideal for commercial buildings, infrastructure work, and high-volume RCC applications where speed and accuracy are critical. With its reversible mixing technology, the drum rotates forward for thorough blending of materials and reverses for efficient discharge, ensuring uniform concrete quality in every batch.

features.title: PRECISION BATCH
features.desc: Load Cell Weighing with Digital Display

extendedSpecs.value: 10 HP Motor, 1 HP Water Pump, 0.5 HP Vibrating Motor

title: JK Mini Crane 500 R
description: The JK MINI CRANE 500 R is a high-performance mini crane specially designed for lifting heavier loads up to 500 kg on high-rise construction projects. Engineered for durability and smooth operation, it is the ideal lifting solution for cement bags, steel bars, concrete blocks, and other construction materials to upper floors with precision and safety. With its 360° boom rotation and customizable boom length, it allows flexible coverage without needing to reposition the machine—perfect for tight and busy job sites. Built to withstand the rigors of daily site operations, the JK MINI 500 R features a compact footprint and quick setup, making it suitable for both residential towers and commercial buildings.

extendedSpecs.label: OPERATION
extendedSpecs.value: Panel Board with Wired Remote Control

title: SAFARI Tower Hoist
description: The SAFARI TOWER HOIST is a robust tower hoist designed for lifting concrete and construction materials to heights up to 200 feet. Engineered for strength and stability, this heavy-duty hoist handles loads of up to 1000 kg, making it ideal for high-rise slab casting, structural RCC work, and material transfer in tall buildings. Driven by either an air-cooled diesel engine or (Electric Motor) (depending on height and site needs), the SAFARI TH operates using a friction roller drive system and high-tensile Usha Martin wire rope. Its stable H-frame scaffolding and scissors mechanism provide a secure and balanced tower structure.

extendedSpecs.label: PRIME MOVERS
extendedSpecs.value: Air Cooled Diesel Engine / Electric Motor

extendedSpecs.label: SCAFFOLDING
extendedSpecs.value: H Frame - B class @ 31.75 mm pipe

title: SAFARI BC-42
description: The SAFARI BC-42 is a powerful bar cutting machine designed for precise shearing of steel reinforcement bars on construction sites. Capable of cutting bars up to 32 mm in diameter, it is ideal for RCC work in buildings, foundations, and infrastructure projects. Powered by a 5 HP three-phase motor with a high-speed gearbox, the SAFARI BC-42 ensures clean, consistent cuts with minimal effort. Built for long operational life and heavy-duty site use, this machine delivers dependable performance in high-volume rebar processing, helping construction teams save time and improve cutting accuracy.

extendedSpecs.label: PRIME MOVER
extendedSpecs.value: 5 HP Three Phase 2850 RPM Motor with Gear Box

title: SAFARI Groove Cutter
description: The SAFARI GC Grove Cutter is a precision-engineered machine designed for cutting grooves in green and dry concrete surfaces. Ideal for expansion joint formation, flooring work, and controlled cracking, this cutter ensures clean, accurate cuts across industrial floors, pavements, and slabs. Powered by a 7.5 HP electric motor with starter, it supports multiple blade options (14" to 16") and thicknesses, allowing operators to adjust for various cutting needs. It delivers a cutting depth of up to 100 mm in green concrete and 60 mm in dry surfaces.

extendedSpecs.label: CUTTING DEPTH
extendedSpecs.value: Green Concrete: 100 mm | Dry Concrete: 60 mm

extendedSpecs.label: OVERALL DIMENSIONS
extendedSpecs.value: L 1460 x W 600 x H 900 mm

title: SAFARI SFPM 2000
description: The Safari SFPM 2000 is a heavy-duty passenger and material hoist built for reliable performance on high-rise construction sites. Designed with advanced safety systems and rugged engineering, it ensures smooth, secure vertical transportation. Powered by high-efficiency drive technology and precision control, the SFPM 2000 combines strength, safety, and smart automation in one dependable lift solution. Its robust structure and intelligent features make it ideal for challenging site conditions, offering consistent performance with minimal downtime.

extendedSpecs.label: VFD, HMI & PLC
extendedSpecs.value: European VFD, HMI, and PLC – L&T
